items.title: What we know about the Iranian ship seized by the US
items.dek: The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.
items.body: The US has intercepted an Iranian ship entering the Gulf as part of its naval blockade, US President Donald Trump has said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US singer D4vd charged with murder stemming from death of missing teenage girl
items.dek: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.
items.body: Prosecutors say he could face life in prison due to special circumstances surrounding the girl's disappearance and death.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: UConn's Ball (wrist) to miss all of next season
items.dek: UConn guard Solo Ball will undergo wrist surgery and miss the entire 2026-27 season.
items.body: UConn guard Solo Ball will undergo wrist surgery and miss the entire 2026-27 season.
items.author: IriLine Desk
